pages.title: Attribute Scaling Format
pages.text: The $(o)attribute_scaling$() field is a map of attribute IDs to scaling configs:$(br2){$(br)  "attribute_scaling": {$(br)    "minecraft:generic.max_health": {$(br)      "base_bonus": 0,$(br)      "per_level": 2,$(br)      "operation": "addition",$(br)      "max_bonus": 100$(br)    }$(br)  }$(br)}

pages.title: Scaling Fields
pages.text: $(bold)base_bonus$() (double, default: 0) - Flat bonus at level 0$(br2)$(bold)per_level$() (double, default: 0) - Bonus per level$(br2)$(bold)operation$() (string):$(br)$(li)$(o)addition$(): Flat value added$(br)$(li)$(o)multiply_base$(): Multiplies base value$(br)$(li)$(o)multiply_total$(): Multiplies current total$(br2)$(bold)max_bonus$() (double, optional) - Cap the bonus

pages.title: Calculation Formula
pages.text: Bonus = base_bonus + (per_level x level)$(br2)Capped by max_bonus if specified.$(br2)Then applied based on operation:$(br2)$(li)addition: +bonus$(li)multiply_base: x(1 + bonus)$(li)multiply_total: x(1 + bonus)$(br2)Multiple modifiers stack through Forge's attribute system.
